records.primary_claim: GameShell — the modular, hackable game console you build yourself
records.execution_detail: Opens by showing the device snapping apart into labelled modules (mainboard, display, keypad, battery, shell) and states each is independently swappable and open-source — installing the belief that modular open hardware is WHY you can fix, upgrade, and reprogram it forever, unlike a sealed console.

verbatim_refs.text: Every part is a module. Swap it, upgrade it, or print your own.

records.embed_text:
belief: mechanism-is-the-reason
execution_type: mechanism-explanation
execution: Opens by showing the device snapping apart into labelled modules (mainboard, display, keypad, battery, shell) and states each is independently swappable and open-source — installing the belief that modular open hardware is WHY you can fix, upgrade, and reprogram it forever, unlike a sealed console.
verbatim: Every part is a module. Swap it, upgrade it, or print your own.
funnel_claim: GameShell — the modular, hackable game console you build yourself

records.primary_claim: GameShell — the modular, hackable game console you build yourself
records.execution_detail: Founder appears on camera in the actual factory, names the contract manufacturer, shows a dated photo of the first production run on the line, and states he has already placed and paid for the full minimum order quantity — installing ship-confidence via founder-financial-skin-in-the-game.

verbatim_refs.text: I've already wired the full MOQ payment to our factory in Shenzhen. The units are being built right now.

belief: trust-the-brand-or-founder
execution_type: founder-credibility

records.primary_claim: GameShell — the modular, hackable game console you build yourself
records.execution_detail: Pins a backer-update timeline showing three prior shipped batches with photos of units in backers' hands and a live counter of units already delivered, converting an abstract crowdfunding promise into observed delivery — installing it-will-ship through demonstrated track record rather than assurance.

verbatim_refs.text: 1,847 units already in backers' hands. Here's the unboxing thread.
Got mine in 6 weeks exactly as promised, build quality is unreal.

records.primary_claim: GameShell — the modular, hackable game console you build yourself
records.execution_detail: First-500-backers early-bird tier at $129 with a live remaining-count that visibly ticks down, then an explicit step to $159, paired with a 14-day campaign clock — constructing urgency from a real price step and a finite allocation rather than a generic countdown.

verbatim_refs.text: Only 73 early-bird units left at $129 — then it's $159.
